title: Hydroxamic Acid as Donors. Chromium (III) Complexes with Hydroxamic Acids
author: B. Chatterjee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Hydroxamic acid complexes, [Cr(RH) 3 ] 0  have been prepared and their structures assigned on the basis of molar conductance, magnetic and spectral measurements. Magnetic moments show three unpaired electrons per chromium for each complex. The complexes have two d-d transitions in the visible region.
steps_raw: Hydroxamic acid complexes, [Cr(RH) 3 ] 0  have been prepared and their structures assigned on the basis of molar conductance, magnetic and spectral measurements. Magnetic moments show three unpaired electrons per chromium for each complex. The complexes have two d-d transitions in the visible region.
